# Data Source: okta_hook_keys

Get a list of hook keys from Okta.

## Schema

### Read-Only

- `hook_keys` (List of Object) The list of hook keys. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--hook_keys))

### Nested Schema for `hook_keys`

Read-Only:

- `created` (String)
- `id` (String)
- `is_used` (Boolean)
- `key_id` (String)
- `last_updated` (String)
- `name` (String)
